examples.eng: Most children enjoy singing.
Her singing was legendary.
Do you hear the birds singing?
They recorded her singing.
The singing was loud and clear.
He was singing to himself quietly.
Her mother was singing lustily.
A kettle was singing on the stove.
Her singing was cold and mechanical.
examples.ru: Её пение было холодным и механическим.

examples.eng: Her singing voice is truly exquisite.
He wanted to try his hand at singing.
examples.ru: Он захотел попробовать свои силы в пении.

examples.eng: She was singing while she was cooking.
I could hear the birds singing outside my window.
examples.ru: Я слышал, как за окном поют птицы.

examples.eng: He entered the Royal College of Music to study singing.
examples.ru: Он поступил в Королевский Музыкальный колледж, чтобы учиться пению.

examples.eng: The music teacher was enthralled with the child's singing.
I knew she was happy again when I heard her singing away in the kitchen.
examples.ru: Я понял, что она снова счастлива, когда услышал, как она всё время поёт на кухне.

examples.eng: Her singing was atrocious.
The nightingale was singing.
Smith's signature singing style
Her singing makes my skin crawl.
examples.ru: От её пения у меня мурашки по коже.

examples.eng: a singing career on the downgrade
She has a unique style of singing.
She has a very sweet singing voice.
You're singing a different tune now!
Someone upstairs was singing off-key.
birds singing from the branches of a tree
examples.ru: птицы, которые поют на ветвях дерева

examples.eng: Mrs Edwards was singing your praises today.
examples.ru: Миссис Эдвардс сегодня пела тебе дифирамбы.

examples.eng: Sue was singing away to herself in the bath.
examples.ru: Сью напевала про себя в ванной.

examples.eng: He eked a living by singing on street corners.
examples.ru: Он перебивался тем, что пел на перекрёстках.

examples.eng: We would hear the birds singing all around us.
examples.ru: Мы слышали бы, как вокруг поют птицы.
